title: The Slowest Man in the World!

scenes.text: There’s actually a man known for being the slowest runner in the world!
He completed a marathon in over 54 hours, breaking the record!
His journey is a testament to determination and spirit.
Slow and steady can win the race!
scenes.label: SLOW AND STEADY

scenes.text: Hit follow for your daily dose of wow.

description: Meet the man known as the slowest runner in the world, completing marathons with unwavering determination. Follow for daily inspiring facts!
